title: Zebby's Couch Kingdom Treaty
text:
## Couch Kingdom Treaty

By order of Zebby, black kitten and self-appointed couch prince, the {adjective} couch is now a sovereign {place}.

Humans may enter only after offering {number} pieces of {food} and saying {silly word} {adverb}.

Violet, the tortie head cat, may overrule this treaty on {day of week}, especially if Zebby tries to {verb} her {object}.

Matilda must keep her {body part} outside the border unless invited by a {adjective} meow.

Any {animal} caught {verb ending in -ing} will be exiled to the {place}.
